overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a Western-themed video game showing a character riding a horse through an arid desert landscape. The journey begins near a small settlement with a white adobe church, crosses railroad tracks, traverses open prairie, passes a horse-drawn wagon, and enters a red rock canyon area marked as 'Sepulcro'.

scene_state.functional_zone: desert settlement with adobe church and railroad

events.description: leaving settlement buildings behind, entering open prairie

agents.ego_description: riding horse away from settlement at a gallop, crossing railroad tracks

entered.detail: small white church with dome and bell tower
rustic wooden fence lining the path
metal railroad tracks crossing the dirt path

segments.scene_description: The segment opens near a desert settlement with a distinctive white adobe church visible to the left. The character rides a horse past wooden fences and stationary wagons, then crosses over railroad tracks around the 5-second mark, leaving the built environment behind.

scene_state.functional_zone: open desert prairie with distant mesas

agents.ego_description: galloping steadily across open desert terrain toward distant red rock formations

entered.detail: large red rock plateau on the horizon
low desert bushes and cacti scattered across the landscape
group of palm trees marking an oasis area

segments.scene_description: The horse rides through expansive open desert with clear views of distant red rock mesas on the horizon. Sparse scrub vegetation and occasional palm trees dot the landscape as the settlement fades behind.

events.description: passing a horse-drawn wagon traveling in the opposite direction
location name 'SEPULCRO' appears at top of screen

agents.ego_description: overtaking a slow-moving wagon on the trail while approaching red rock formations

notable_agents.action: horse-drawn wagon with two occupants moving slowly in opposite direction

entered.detail: reddish rock formation emerging from the terrain

segments.scene_description: The character encounters and passes a horse-drawn wagon traveling the opposite way on the narrow trail. Red rock formations grow larger on the horizon, and the location text 'SEPULCRO' appears as the terrain begins to transition toward canyon country.

events.description: entering narrow canyon passage between towering red rock walls

agents.ego_description: navigating horse through winding canyon trail with rock walls closing in

entered.detail: tall red rock canyon walls rising on both sides
massive rock boulder beside the trail

segments.scene_description: The trail winds through a narrow red rock canyon with towering walls on both sides. The sky becomes partially obscured by the canyon rim, creating a more enclosed and dramatic landscape as the horse continues along the winding dirt path.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous journey from a quiet desert settlement into the depths of a towering red rock canyon. It begins by riding past a white adobe church and wooden fences before crossing over railroad tracks to leave the built environment behind. As the settlement fades, the scene opens into an expansive desert prairie dotted with sparse scrub and palm trees, with distant red rock mesas appearing on the horizon. The camera then passes a horse-drawn wagon on a narrow trail as the terrain shifts toward the region of Sepulcro, where the red rock formations grow increasingly prominent. Finally, the path winds into a narrow canyon, where the towering walls rise to partially obscure the sky and create a dramatic, enclosed landscape.
